_comment: Repo Settings → General → Pull Requests block per REPO_STANDARDS.md §9. Uniform across all tiers. Consumed by `install/apply-standards.sh --apply` (PR-C2) via `gh api PATCH /repos/{owner}/{repo}`. Rebase-merge is DISABLED — verdicts anchor to PR HEAD SHA (see canon §9 rationale). Squash-only keeps main linear + one-to-one with reviewed HEAD.
_apply_note: PR-C2 MUST strip ALL `_`-prefix keys before POST/PUT/PATCH. Use `jq 'del(.._comment, .._apply_note, .._docs, .._endpoint, .._umbrella_note)'` or equivalent. GitHub REST endpoints strictly validate unknown fields.
